cot_prefix: Okay, let me read the text and find the answer to the question. The question is about the lines of the film "Elephant" and asks how they were created. The options are (A) created by student actors, (B) given by the director, (C) carefully designed by professional people, and (D) thought out by the director during the acting. Looking at the text: "This is Elephant. It stars real school kids. American director Gus Van Sant had no ready-made lines.
